[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 01101101 5
1 01101000 3
2 01101000 3
3 11011111 7
4 11010010 4
5 11000011 4
6 10111001 5
7 01101000 3

01 11011111 7 match 3
12 11111111 a
23 11111111 a
